docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF RE: UPDATE OF DEFENDANT'S ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUNAR, JEFF
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JONATHAN POLLAND; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-02-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-04-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. ON FEB-10-17 THE MATTER WAS CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE. THE PLAINTIFF UNDATED THE DEFENDANTS ADDRESS. THE COURT'S NOTICE TO THE DEFENDANT OF THE NEW HEARING DATE WAS RETURNED AS RETURN TO SENDER. PLAINTIFF JEFF MUNAR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SKULLY, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 4/4/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-ATTEMPTEDJ-NOT KNOWN-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "UNCLAIMED" COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SKULLY INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-10-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JEFF MUNAR. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-10-2017 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO MAR-02-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JEFF MUNAR IS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT SKULLY, INC. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK:RETURN MAIL (SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER) UNABLE TO FORWARD.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUNAR, JEFF AS TO DEFENDANT SKULLY INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED JAN-25-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SKULLY INC.
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL. NO APPEARANCES; (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 8/31/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MUNAR, JEFF AS TO DEFENDANT SKULLY INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-08-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MUNAR, JEFF
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 02/10/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "NO MAIL RECEPTACLE-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
